name: Oatmeal Dinner Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring water to a boil; add oats and butter.
2. Cook and stir for 1 minute. Remove from the heat; cool to lukewarm.
3. In a mixing bowl, dissolve yeast in warm water.
4. Add the oat mixture, sugars, salt, and 4 cups of flour; beat until smooth.
5. Add enough remaining flour to form a soft dough.
6. Turn onto a floured board; knead until smooth and elastic, about 6-8 minutes.
7. Place in a greased bowl, turning once to grease the top. Cover and let rise in a warm place until doubled, about 1 hour.
8. Punch down; allow to rest for 10 minutes.
9. Shape into 18 balls. Place in two greased 9-inch round pans.
10. Cover and let rise until doubled, about 45 minutes.
11. Bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
12. Cool on wire racks.
